title: Croatian Pastel
description: A traditional Croatian pastry filled with a sweet rice and flour mixture.
instructions: Mix flour, rice, and bake in a bowl.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter.
Place a spoonful of the rice mixture in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a triangle.
Press the edges together to seal the pastry.
Brush the tops with a little water and bake for 20-25 minutes.
Serve warm, dust with powdered sugar if desired.
